stdout:
Table	Create Table
material_boards	CREATE TABLE `material_boards` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `supplierId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `boardNumber` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `boardName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `pricePerMeter` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `currency` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CNY',
  `minOrderQuantity` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `leadTime` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('active','inactive') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `materialType` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `material_boards_supplier_idx` (`supplierId`),
  KEY `material_boards_number_idx` (`boardNumber`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`supplierId`) REFERENCES `5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8`.`material_suppliers` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
